strategy_hypotheses.rationale: M69 shadow research showed strong-trend continuation misses that are outside frozen CPB pullback rules.

limitations: Research-only shadow labels; no active CPB behavior changed.
Frozen CPB baseline has a small persisted-pick sample in this window.
Requires forward monitoring before paper observation.
shadow_comparison.rule_summary: Entry price >=10, prior runup >18%, near 20d high, constructive prior volume. Intended to study strong-trend continuation misses.

strategy_hypotheses.title: Shadow candidate: trend-extension continuation bucket.

strategy_hypotheses.rationale: M69 shadow research found near-high pressure setups with intraday optionality but unstable close returns.

limitations: Research-only shadow labels; no active CPB behavior changed.
Frozen CPB baseline has a small persisted-pick sample in this window.
Requires forward monitoring before paper observation.
shadow_comparison.rule_summary: Near 20d high with constructive prior volume and no severe 5d weakness. Intended to study pressure-before-breakout misses.

strategy_hypotheses.title: Shadow candidate: breakout-pressure bucket.

strategy_hypotheses.rationale: Low-price movers explain part of CPB misses, but risk, liquidity, and sizing must remain separate.

limitations: Research-only shadow labels; no active CPB behavior changed.
Frozen CPB baseline has a small persisted-pick sample in this window.
Requires forward monitoring before paper observation.
shadow_comparison.rule_summary: Entry price <10. Kept separate because active CPB filters these out for risk control.

strategy_hypotheses.title: Shadow candidate: low-price momentum micro-sleeve.

strategy_hypotheses.rationale: M69 pre-confirm research can surface names before CPB confirmation, but its low confirmation rate requires an explicit observation lane rather than trade-plan generation.

limitations: Pre-confirm output is a watchlist, not an automatic buy list.
Next-day confirmation and operator review are required before paper observation.

strategy_hypotheses.title: Shadow candidate: pre-confirm watchlist observation lane.

strategy_hypotheses.rationale: M69 dip-buy research found a possible deep-retrace observation variant, but it must stay separate from confirmed CPB entries until drawdown controls are validated.

limitations: Dip-buy entries are earlier than CPB confirmation and can buy into drawdown.
Requires sizing, stop, and observation rules before any paper use.

strategy_hypotheses.title: Shadow candidate: pullback dip-buy observation lane.
